title: potentilla squalida
intro: Potentilla squalida, also known as Yellow Potentilla or Squalid Potentilla, is a flowering plant species in the rose family, known for its bright yellow flowers and medicinal properties. The plant is used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Potentilla squalida include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat digestive issues and respiratory problems.
